step_name: Deploy and monitor with human oversight

subprocess_flow.description: Define and document the specific mechanisms for human intervention, including the roles, responsibilities, and authority of human overseers. This includes setting clear thresholds for when a human must override an automated decision to ensure safety and compliance with the EU AI Act.
success_criteria: Protocol is formally approved by the AI Ethics Committee.
Intervention thresholds are clearly defined and measurable.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure that the AI system remains under meaningful human control as required by regulation.
subprocess_flow.scope: Governance and procedural definition of human-in-the-loop mechanisms.
end_conditions: Human Oversight Protocol is finalized and signed off.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Explicitly documented decision-making hierarchy in the protocol.

change_management.change_request_process: Formal submission to the AI Governance Board.
change_management.versioning_rules: Major version increment for changes to intervention thresholds.

subprocess_flow.description: Set up and calibrate the automated monitoring tools to track real-time performance metrics, data drift, and model accuracy. The dashboard must be configured to trigger alerts based on the thresholds defined in the Human Oversight Protocol.
success_criteria: Dashboard displays real-time drift and performance metrics.
Alerting system successfully notifies the Risk Management Team during test triggers.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To provide visibility into the operational health and compliance of the AI system.
subprocess_flow.scope: Technical configuration of monitoring and alerting infrastructure.
end_conditions: Dashboard is live and monitoring production data.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Redundant monitoring streams and heartbeat checks.

subprocess_flow.description: Deploy the AI model into the production environment following the organization's standard release management procedures. This includes final smoke testing and verification that the monitoring dashboard is correctly capturing production telemetry.
success_criteria: Initial production outputs meet accuracy benchmarks.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To transition the AI system from a certified state to active operational use.
end_conditions: System is fully operational in the production environment.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Environment mismatch leading to performance degradation.
step_risks_and_controls.control: Automated environment parity checks and rollback scripts.

change_management.versioning_rules: Semantic versioning for model and infrastructure.

subprocess_flow.description: Perform continuous monitoring of the AI system's outputs and behavior. Human overseers must review alerts, investigate anomalies, and exercise intervention or 'kill-switch' protocols if the system drifts outside of acceptable compliance or performance boundaries.
success_criteria: 100% of high-priority alerts are investigated within defined SLAs.
System operates within performance and compliance parameters.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To maintain operational integrity and regulatory compliance through active human vigilance.
subprocess_flow.scope: Daily operational monitoring and intervention activities.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Real-time drift detection and human intervention triggers.
Rotation of oversight staff and mandatory peer reviews of interventions.

governance_requirements: EU AI Act Human Oversight Requirements

change_management.versioning_rules: Log versioning linked to system timestamps.
